meta.description: Coda formula reference - base and action formulas

Collections.name: Count
Collections.description: Counts the size of a list
Collections.output: Outputs the count of non-blank values in list(s).

Collections.name: CountUnique
Collections.output: Outputs a count of all of the unique value(s) ignoring duplicates and blank values. Counts each unique item in a value if it is a list.

Collections.name: Find
Collections.description: Get the position of a value
Collections.output: Outputs the first position of needle in haystack starting at startAt, or -1 if not found. Works with text and lists.

Collections.name: MaxBy
Collections.description: Get the row of a table with the maximum value in the provided column, or item in a list with the maximum value by the provided formula.
Collections.output: Outputs the maximum item inlist based on evaluating compareBy over each item. This will return the item in the original list, not the value that is used for comparison - use Max(list.compareBy) instead to only fetch the maximum compared value.

Collections.name: MinBy
Collections.description: Get the row of a table with the minimum value in the provided column, or item in a list with the minimum value by the provided formula.
Collections.output: Outputs the minimum item in list based on evaluating compareBy over each item. This will return the item in the original list, not the value that is used for comparison - use Min(list.compareBy) instead to only fetch the minimum compared value.

Collections.name: Slice
Collections.description: Get part of a list or text
Collections.output: Outputs a part of the provided value based on the start and end positions.

Collections.name: Sort
Collections.output: Outputs dataset in sorted order. Sort order and criteria are specified by the ascending, sortBy and sortByCount inputs.

Collections.name: Splice
Collections.description: Remove and add to a list or text
Collections.output: Outputs value with deleteCount values removed and insertValue(s) added at start position.

Dates.name: Created
Dates.description: Get the created date/time for a row or other object
Dates.output: Outputs the created date/time for object.

Dates.name: CurrentTimezone
Dates.description: Get the user's current time zone
Dates.output: Outputs the user's current time zone.

Dates.name: Date
Dates.description: Create a date value
Dates.output: Outputs the date of the provided year, month, and day.

Dates.name: DateTime
Dates.signature: DateTime(year, month, day, hour, minute, second)
Dates.description: Create a date time value
Dates.output: Outputs the date of the provided year, month, day, hour, minute, and second.

Dates.name: DateTimeTruncate
Dates.description: Round a date/time
Dates.output: Outputs dateOrTime rounded to the nearest unit.

Dates.name: DateToEpoch
Dates.description: Convert date to epoch
Dates.output: Outputs date as an epoch time (the number of seconds since Jan 1st, 1970).

Dates.name: Day
Dates.description: Get the day-of-month from a date/time
Dates.output: Outputs the day of month of the given dateTime as a number.

Dates.name: DocumentTimezone
Dates.description: Get the document's timezone
Dates.output: Outputs the document's timezone.

Dates.name: EndOfMonth
Dates.description: Get the last day of a given month
Dates.output: Outputs the date for the last day of the month of dateTime plus monthOffset.

Dates.name: EpochToDate
Dates.description: Convert epoch time to date
Dates.output: Outputs epochTime as a date.

Dates.name: Hour
Dates.description: Get the hour from a date/time
Dates.output: Outputs the hour of the given dateOrTime as a number.

Dates.name: IsoWeekNumber
Dates.description:
Get the week number of a date in the ISO week numbering system,
      where week 1 contains the first Thursday of the year and weeks start on Monday
Dates.output: Outputs the week of dateTime as a number between 1 and 52.

Dates.name: IsoWeekday
Dates.description: Get the day-of-week of a date/time as a number in the ISO week numbering system, where Monday is 1.
Dates.output: Outputs the day-of-week of dateTime as a number between 1 and 7.

Dates.name: Minute
Dates.description: Get the minute from a date/time
Dates.output: Outputs the minute of the given dateOrTime as a number.

Dates.name: Modified
Dates.description: Get the modified date/time for a row or other object
Dates.output: Outputs the modified date/time for object.

Dates.name: Month
Dates.description: Get the month from a date
Dates.output: Outputs the month of the given dateTime as a number.

Dates.name: MonthName
Dates.description: Get the month name for a date
Dates.output: Outputs the month name for given dateTime as text.

Dates.name: NetWorkingDays
Dates.description: Count working days between dates. Customize working days in region and date settings.
Dates.output: Outputs the count of working days between startDate and endDate excluding holidays. Customize working days in region and date settings.

Dates.name: Now
Dates.description: Get the current date/time
Dates.output: Outputs the current date and time. Updates based on precision specified.

Dates.name: RelativeDate
Dates.description: Add months to a date/time
Dates.output: Outputs months added to dateTime rounded to the day.

Dates.name: Second
Dates.description: Get the "second" from a date/time
Dates.output: Outputs the seconds part of the given dateOrTime as a number.

Dates.name: Time
Dates.description: Create a time value
Dates.output: Outputs the time of the provided hour, minute, and second.

Dates.name: TimeValue
Dates.description: Convert a time to a number
Dates.output: Outputs time as a decimal ratio of the day.

Dates.name: ToDate
Dates.description: Convert text into a date value. Respects the doc's date order setting.
Dates.output: Outputs the value of text parsed into a date. Outputs blank if text can't be parsed.

Dates.name: ToDateTime
Dates.description: Converts text into a date/time. Respects the doc's date order setting.
Dates.output: Outputs the value of datetime parsed into a date and time. Outputs blank if datetimecan't be parsed.

Dates.name: ToTime
Dates.description: Converts a value into a time
Dates.output: Outputs the value of value parsed into a time. Outputs blank if valuecan't be parsed.

Dates.name: Today
Dates.description: Get today's date
Dates.output: Outputs the current date. Updates daily.

Dates.name: WeekNumber
Dates.description:
Get the week number of a date, where week 1 contains Jan 1. Respects the doc’s first day of week setting.
      Use "IsoWeekNumber()" if week 1 should contain the first Thursday of the year.
Dates.output: Outputs the week of dateTime as a number between 1 and 52.

Dates.name: Weekday
Dates.description: Get the day-of-week of a date/time as a number. Respects the doc’s first day of week setting.
Dates.output: Outputs the day-of-week of dateTime as a number between 1 and 7.

Dates.name: WeekdayName
Dates.description: Get the day-of-week of a date as text
Dates.output: Outputs the day-of-week of dateTime as text ("Monday", "Tuesday", etc.).

Dates.name: Workday
Dates.description: Adds working days to a date. Customize working days in region and date settings.
Dates.output: Outputs a date based on your startDate plus the numWorkingDays you wish to move forward skipping over any dates included in holidays.

Dates.name: Year
Dates.description: Get the year of a date
Dates.output: Outputs the year of the given dateTime as a number.

Duration.name: Days
Duration.output: Outputs a time duration for the specified number of days.

Duration.name: Duration
Duration.output: Outputs a time duration for the specified number of days, hours, minutes, and seconds.

Duration.name: Hours
Duration.output: Outputs a time duration for the specified number of hours.

Duration.name: Minutes
Duration.output: Outputs a time duration for the specified number of minutes.

Duration.name: Seconds
Duration.output: Outputs a time duration for the specified number of seconds.

Duration.name: ToDays
Duration.description: Convert a time duration into a number of days
Duration.output: Outputs a number of days for the specified duration.

Duration.name: ToHours
Duration.description: Convert a time duration into a number of hours
Duration.output: Outputs a number of hours for the specified duration.

Duration.name: ToMinutes
Duration.description: Convert a time duration into a number of minutes
Duration.output: Outputs a number of minutes for the specified duration.

Duration.name: ToSeconds
Duration.description: Convert a time duration into a number of seconds
Duration.output: Outputs a number of seconds for the specified duration.

Filters.name: AverageIf
Filters.description: Compute the average of a filtered list of numbers
Filters.output: Outputs the average of a list of numbers for values matching expression. Blank values are ignored.

Filters.name: CountIf
Filters.description: Get the count for a filtered list
Filters.output: Outputs the count of values in list for values matching expression. Blank values are ignored.

Filters.name: Filter
Filters.description: Gets a list of values that match your filter
Filters.output: Outputs a list of all values in list that match expression.

Filters.name: IsFromTable
Filters.description: Check if a reference is from a table
Filters.output: Outputs True if row is a row in table. Otherwise outputs False.

Filters.name: Lookup
Filters.description: Get the rows from a table that match your filter
Filters.output: Outputs the rows from a table where column is the same as match value. We recommend using Table.Filter() instead.

Filters.name: Matches
Filters.description: Checks if a Coda control matches a value
Filters.output: Outputs True if the given value matches the control. Otherwise outputs False.

Filters.name: SumIf
Filters.description: Compute the sum for a filtered list
Filters.output: Outputs the sum of a list of numbers for values matching expression. Blank values are ignored.

Formats.name: FormatCurrency
Formats.signature: FormatCurrency(currency code, value, format, precision, symbol position)
Formats.description: Formats the provided number to a currency

Formats.name: FormatPercent
Formats.description: Formats the provided number to a percentage

Info.name: IsAnyText
Info.description: Checks if a value is plain text or rich text
Info.output: Outputs True if the given value is plain text or rich text. Otherwise, outputs False.

Info.name: IsBlank
Info.description: Check if a value is blank
Info.output: Outputs True  if the given value is blank. Otherwise, outputs False.

Info.name: IsDate
Info.description: Checks if a value is a date
Info.output: Outputs True if the given value is a date. Otherwise, outputs False.

Info.name: IsLogical
Info.description: Checks if a value is true or false
Info.output: Outputs True if the given value is True or False. Outputs False if it's neither.

Info.name: IsNotBlank
Info.description: Checks if a value is not blank
Info.output: Outputs True if the given value is not blank. Otherwise, outputs False.

Info.name: IsNotText
Info.description: Checks if a value is not text
Info.output: Outputs True if the given value is not blank. Otherwise, outputs False.

Info.name: IsNumber
Info.description: Checks if a value is a number
Info.output: Outputs True if the given value is a number. Otherwise, outputs False.

Info.name: IsPlainText
Info.description: Checks if a value is plain text
Info.output: Outputs True if the given value is plain text. Otherwise, outputs False. Will output False if value is rich text.

Info.name: IsRichText
Info.description: Checks if a value is rich text
Info.output: Outputs True if the given value is rich text. Otherwise, outputs False. Will output False if value is plain text.

Info.name: ToNumber
Info.description: Convert a value to a number
Info.output: Outputs value as a number if conversion with base is possible. Otherwise outputs value.

Lists.name: All
Lists.description: Checks if an expression evaluates to true for all values in a list
Lists.output: Outputs True if the result for evaluating expression on every value in list is true.

Lists.name: Any
Lists.description: Checks if an expression evaluates to true for any value in a list
Lists.output: Outputs True if the result for evaluating expression on any value in list is true.

Lists.name: Contains
Lists.description: Checks if a list contains any value from a list
Lists.output: Outputs True if any value in search exists in value.

Lists.name: ContainsAll
Lists.description: Checks if a list contains all values from a list
Lists.output: Outputs True if all values in search exists in value.

Lists.name: ContainsOnly
Lists.description: Checks if a list contains only values from a list
Lists.output: Outputs True if only values in search exist in value.

Lists.name: CountAll
Lists.description: Counts the size of a list including blank values
Lists.output: Outputs the count of values in list, including blank values.

Lists.name: Duplicates
Lists.description: Get duplicate values
Lists.output: Outputs a list of values which appear multiple times.

Lists.name: First
Lists.description: Get the first value from a list
Lists.output: Outputs the first value in list or blank if the list is empty.

Lists.name: ForEach
Lists.description: Run a formula for every item in a list
Lists.output: Evaluates formula for every value in list and outputs a list of all formula outputs.

Lists.name: FormulaMap
Lists.description: Run a formula for every item in a list
Lists.output: Evaluates formula for every value in list and outputs a list of all formula outputs.

Lists.name: In
Lists.description: Checks if a value is in a list
Lists.output: Outputs True if search is found in value.

Lists.name: Last
Lists.description: Get the last value from a list
Lists.output: Outputs the last value in list or blank if the list is empty.

Lists.name: List
Lists.description: Make a list of values
Lists.output: Outputs a list of value(s) or an empty list if no value is provided.

Lists.name: ListCombine
Lists.description: Merge and flatten lists
Lists.output: Outputs a list of all value(s). Nested lists are flattened in the output.

Lists.name: Nth
Lists.description: Returns the nth item in a list from the number provided
Lists.output: Outputs the value from list at position. Results in an error if position is outside of list.

Lists.name: RandomItem
Lists.description: Select a random item from a list
Lists.output: Outputs a random item from list. Regenerates on every edit by default.

Lists.name: RandomSample
Lists.description: Generate a random sample of items from a list
Lists.output: Outputs a random sample of count items from list. By default, samples without replacement and regenerates on every edit.

Lists.name: ReverseList
Lists.description: Reverse the values in a list
Lists.output: Returns list reversed.

Lists.name: Sequence
Lists.description: Returns a list of numbers between the provided from and to parameters
Lists.output: Outputs a list of numbers from start to end. Step size is controlled via the by input.

Lists.name: Unique
Lists.description: Deduplicate values
Lists.output: Outputs a list of unique value(s). Deduplicates against each item in a value if it is a list.

Logical.name: And
Logical.description: Returns true if all the items are true, otherwise false
Logical.output: Outputs True if all value(s) are true. Otherwise returns False.

Logical.name: If
Logical.output: Outputs ifTrue if the condition is true. Otherwise outputs ifFalse.

Logical.name: IfBlank
Logical.description: Get a value with fallback if blank
Logical.output: Outputs ifBlank if value is blank. Otherwise outputs value.

Logical.name: Not
Logical.description: Negate a true or false value
Logical.output: Outputs True if valueis false and False if value is true.

Logical.name: Or
Logical.description: Check if any input is true
Logical.output: Outputs True if any value is true. Otherwise outputs False.

Logical.name: Switch
Logical.description: Get a value conditionally. Handles multiple conditions
Logical.output: Outputs the first result where value matches expression. Outputs an optional final value if no value matches.

Logical.name: SwitchIf
Logical.description: Get a value conditionally. Handles multiple conditions with a fallback
Logical.output: Outputs the first ifTrue value where condition is true. Outputs the an optional final value if no condition is true.

Math.name: AbsoluteValue
Math.description: Get the absolute value of a number
Math.output: Outputs number without the sign, so negative numbers become positive in the output.

Math.name: Average
Math.description: Averages a list of numbers ignoring any blank values
Math.output: Outputs the average value. Blank values are ignored. All items in value are averaged if value is a list.

Math.name: BinomialCoefficient
Math.description: Calculates the Binomial Coefficient
Math.output: Outputs the number of ways to choose k items out of n possibilities. In math, the symbols nCk and (n k) can denote a bionmial coefficient, and are sometimes read as "n choose k".

Math.name: Ceiling
Math.description: Rounds a number up to the nearest multiple
Math.output: Outputs value rounded up to the nearest multiple of factor.

Math.name: Even
Math.description: Rounds a number up to the nearest even number
Math.output: Outputs value rounded up to the nearest even number.

Math.name: Exponent
Math.description: Returns Euler's number e (~2.718) raised to a power
Math.output: Outputs Euler's number for value e (~2.718) raised to a power.

Math.name: Factorial
Math.description: Calculates the product of an integer and all the integers below it
Math.output:
Outputs the product of an integer value and all the integers below it. If the number if a decimal will only use the initial integer.
 Note: Inputs greater than 19 may cause precision errors.

Math.name: Floor
Math.description: Rounds a number down to the nearest multiple
Math.output: Outputs value rounded down to the nearest multiple of factor.

Math.name: IsEven
Math.description: Checks if a value is even
Math.output: Outputs True if value is even. Otherwise returns False.

Math.name: IsOdd
Math.description: Checks if a value is odd
Math.output: Outputs True if value is odd. Otherwise returns False.

Math.name: Ln
Math.description: Get the natural logarithm of a number. (Base e)
Math.output: Outputs the logarithm of number, base e (Euler's number).

Math.name: Log
Math.description: Get the logarithm of a number for a given base
Math.output: Outputs the logarithm of number to base.

Math.name: Log10
Math.description: Get the logarithm of a number (base 10)
Math.output: Get the logarithm of number (base 10).

Math.name: Max
Math.description: Get the maximum number or date/time
Math.output: Outputs the maximum value. Blank values are ignored. Checks all items in value if value is a list. Use MaxBy instead to get the maximum value by a specific criteria.

Math.name: Median
Math.description: Get the median number or date/time
Math.output: Outputs the median value. Blank values are ignored. Checks all items in value if value is a list.

Math.name: Min
Math.description: Gets the minimum number or date/time
Math.output: Outputs the minimum value. Blank values are ignored. Checks all items in value if value is a list. Use MinBy instead to get the minimum value by a specific criteria.

Math.name: Mode
Math.description: Get the most common value
Math.output: Outputs the mode (most frequently occurring) value. Blank values are ignored. Checks all items in value if value is  a list.

Math.name: Odd
Math.description: Rounds a number up to the nearest odd number
Math.output: Outputs value rounded up to the nearest odd number.

Math.name: Percentile
Math.description: Get the value at a given percentile of a dataset
Math.output: Outputs the interpolated value at the given percentile within dataset.

Math.name: PercentileRank
Math.description: Get percentile rank of a value in a dataset
Math.output: Outputs the percentile rank of value within dataset.

Math.name: Pi
Math.description: The mathematical π (pi) constant
Math.output: Outputs the mathematical π (pi) constant.

Math.name: Power
Math.description: Calculates a number raised to a power
Math.output: Outputs number raised to exponent.

Math.name: Product
Math.description: Multiplies numbers together
Math.output:
Outputs the mathematical product of all values.
Blank values are ignored. Multiplies all items in value if value is a list.

Math.name: Quotient
Math.description: Divide one number by another
Math.output: Outputs dividend divided by divisor.

Math.name: Random
Math.description: Generate a random number
Math.output: Outputs a random number between 0 and 1 (including 0, excluding 1). Regenerates on every edit by default.

Math.name: RandomInteger
Math.description: Generate a random number between two values
Math.output: Outputs a random number between low and high.

Math.name: Rank
Math.description: Returns the ordered position of a value in a list
Math.output: Outputs the position of a value within dataset when sorted.

Math.name: Remainder
Math.description: Gets the remainder from dividing two numbers
Math.output: Outputs the remainder when dividend is divided by divisor.

Math.name: Round
Math.description: Round a number
Math.output: Outputs number rounded to the specific number of decimal places.

Math.name: RoundDown
Math.description: Round a number down
Math.output: Outputs number rounded down to the specified number of decimal places.

Math.name: RoundTo
Math.description: Rounds one number to the nearest integer multiple of another
Math.output: Outputs value rounded to the nearest multiple of factor. If no factor is specified rounds to the nearest integer.

Math.name: RoundUp
Math.description: Round a number up
Math.output: Outputs number rounded up to the specified number of decimal places.

Math.name: Sign
Math.description: Get the sign of a number
Math.output: Outputs -1 if number is negative, 0 if number is zero, or 1 if number is positive.

Math.name: SquareRoot
Math.description: Calculates the square root of a number
Math.output: Outputs the square root of number.

Math.name: StandardDeviation
Math.description: Estimates the standard deviation of a population based on a sample of values
Math.output: Outputs the estimated standard deviation based on the sample in values. Blank values are ignored. All items in value are considered if value is a list.

Math.name: StandardDeviationPopulation
Math.description: Calculates the standard deviation based on an entire population
Math.output: Outputs the standard deviation based on values that make up the entire population. Blank values are ignored. All items in value are considered if value is a list.

Math.name: Sum
Math.description: Adds numbers together
Math.output: Outputs the mathematical sum of all values. Blank values are ignored. Sum all items in value if value is a list.

Math.name: SumProduct
Math.description: Calculates the total from multiplying two lists
Math.output: Outputs the total sum of the products of list1 and list2. Each list must be of equal size.

Math.name: Truncate
Math.description: Truncates a number
Math.output: Outputs number truncated to places.

Misc.name: DocId
Misc.description: Gets the document ID from a Coda doc URL.
Misc.output: Outputs the document ID from the given url.

Misc.name: ObjectLink
Misc.description: Get the url for an object

Misc.name: PageName
Misc.description: Get the name of the page an object belongs to
Misc.output: Outputs the name of the page that object belongs to.

Misc.name: ParseCSV
Misc.output:
Outputs a list of items by parsing a csvString delimited by a delimiter. The delimiter can be changed to work with other formats like TSV.
You can also use our CSV importer for one-off imports.

Misc.name: SwapDocIdInUrl
Misc.description: Updates a Coda doc URL to point to a new doc id.

Object.name: ParseJSON
Object.output: Outputs the value parsed from jsonString at path. If path is not specified, outputs the entire parsed value.

People.name: CreatedBy
People.description: Get the creator for a row or other object
People.output: Outputs the user who created object.

People.name: IsSignedIn
People.description: Checks if the current user is logged in
People.output: Outputs True if the current user is logged in. Otherwise, outputs False.

People.name: ModifiedBy
People.description: Returns the user who modified the previous item
People.output: Outputs the user who modified object most recently.

People.name: User
People.description: Get the current logged in user
People.output:
Outputs the current user. Will be different for every user.
Note:
* User().email returns the current user emails
* User().name returns the current users name
*User().photo returns the current users photo
*User().state returns the current users doc access (e.g. write access).

Relational.name: Let
Relational.description: Names a value so you can refer to it inside an expression. Useful if you want to use a value multiple times (i.e., as a local variable) or give it a clearer name. If you have a nested formula with an inner and outer CurrentValue, you can give each of them distinct names

Relational.name: RowId
Relational.description: A unique ID for a row
Relational.output: Outputs a unique ID for row.

Relational.name: WithName
Relational.description: Names a value so you can refer to it inside an expression. Useful if you want to use a value multiple times (i.e., as a local variable) or give it a clearer name. If you have a nested formula with an inner and outer CurrentValue, you can give each of them distinct names

RichText.name: BulletedList
RichText.description: Create a bulleted list of values
RichText.output: Outputs a bulleted list of given value(s).

RichText.name: IndentBy
RichText.description: Change the relative indent of content
RichText.output: Outputs text with indent adjusted by levels.

RichText.name: NumberedList
RichText.description: Create a numbered list of values
RichText.output: Outputs a numbered list of given value(s).

Shape.name: ClipCircle
Shape.description: Crops an image into a circle

Shape.name: Embed
Shape.description: Get an HTML embed for a URL
Shape.output: Outputs an HTML embed for url with the specified width and height.

Shape.name: Hyperlink
Shape.output: Outputs a link that shows the given displayValue and navigates to url.

Shape.name: HyperlinkCard
Shape.output: Outputs a card for the given url.

Shape.name: Image
Shape.signature: Image(url, width, height, name, style, outline)
Shape.description: Gets an image for a URL
Shape.output: Outputs an image for url with the specified width, height, name, style, and outline.

Shape.name: Rectangle
Shape.output: Outputs a rectangle with specified width, height, color, and name.

Spatial.name: Distance
Spatial.description: Returns the distance (in kilometers) between two locations (lat/long) on earth using the Haversine formula
Spatial.output: Outputs the distance in specified unit between location1 and location2 using the Haversine formula.

Spatial.name: Location
Spatial.signature: Location(latitude, longitude, altitude, heading, speed, accuracy, altitudeAccuracy)
Spatial.description: Get location for the provided lat-long
Spatial.output:
Outputs a single location object using latitude and longitude. Can also optionally include altitude, heading, speed, accuracy, and altitudeAccuracy.
Useful with Distance().

String.name: Character
String.description: Create a unicode character (symbol)
String.output: Outputs a single unicode character matching the charNumber given. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Unicode_characters.

String.name: Concatenate
String.description: Combine multiple text values
String.output: Outputs the combined text of all text values as a single text value.

String.name: ContainsText
String.description: Check if one text contains another.
String.output: Outputs True if text contains searchText.

String.name: DecodeFromBase64
String.description: Decodes base64 encoded text
String.output: Outputs base64Text as a string.

String.name: EncodeAsBase64
String.description: Encodes text as base64
String.output: Outputs text base64 encoded.

String.name: EncodeForUrl
String.description: Encodes text use in a URL
String.output: Outputs text formatted so it can be used in the query string of a URL.

String.name: EndsWith
String.description: Check if text ends with a suffix
String.output: Outputs True if text ends with suffix. Otherwise outputs False.

String.name: Format
String.description: Substitute values into a text template
String.output: Outputs text with all {X} values in template replaced with the matching text.

String.name: Join
String.description: Combine multiple text values with a delimiter
String.output: Outputs text combining all text(s) with delimiter in-between every item.

String.name: Left
String.description: Extract starting characters from text
String.output: Outputs the starting numberOfCharacters from text.

String.name: LeftPad
String.description: Pad text from the left
String.output: Outputs text padded with padString at the start so that the resulting text has the given targetLength.

String.name: Length
String.description: Returns length of the given text
String.output: Outputs the number of characters in text.

String.name: LineBreak
String.description: Returns a line break
String.output: Outputs a line break.

String.name: Lower
String.description: Convert text to lower case
String.output: Outputs text with all characters made lower case.

String.name: Middle
String.description: Extract characters from the middle of text
String.output: Outputs numberOfCharacters from text starting at position.

String.name: RegexExtract
String.description: Return the parts of text that match a regular expression
String.output: Outputs the portions of text that match regularExpression

String.name: RegexMatch
String.description: Check if text matches a regular expression
String.output: Outputs True if text matches regularExpression.

String.name: RegexReplace
String.description: Substitute regular expression matches
String.output: Outputs text with all regularExpression matches replaced with replacementText.

String.name: Repeat
String.description: Repeats text multiple times
String.output: Outputs text based on repeating text by the number of repetitions specified.

String.name: Replace
String.description: Replace a range within text
String.output: Outputs text with numberOfCharacters removed starting at and replaced with replacementText.

String.name: Right
String.description: Extract ending characters from text
String.output: Outputs ending characters of text.

String.name: RightPad
String.description: Pad text from the right
String.output: Outputs text padded with padText at the end so that the resulting text has the given targetLength.

String.name: Split
String.description: Split text on a delimiter
String.output: Outputs a list generated from splitting text by the delimiter character.

String.name: StartsWith
String.description: Check if text starts with specified characters
String.output: Outputs True if text starts with prefix. Otherwise outputs False.

String.name: Substitute
String.description: Replace the first matching substring in some text
String.output: Outputs text with the first searchFor match replaced with replacementText.

String.name: SubstituteAll
String.description: Replace all matching substrings in some text
String.output: Outputs text with all searchFor matches replaced with replacementText.

String.name: ToByteSize
String.description: Pretty-print a byte count (KB, MB, GB, etc.)
String.output: Outputs a text rendering of byteCount (KB, MB, GB, etc.).

String.name: ToHexadecimal
String.description: Convert a number to a hexadecimal string
String.output: Outputs a text of decimalNumber converted to hexadecimal. Left-pads result with 0's to satisfy targetLength if specified.

String.name: Trim
String.description: Trim starting and ending spaces from text
String.output: Outputs text with all of the leading and trailing spaces removed.

String.name: Upper
String.description: Convert text to upper case
String.output: Outputs text with all characters made upper case.

actionFormulas.name: Activate
actionFormulas.description: Places the cursor on the given object
actionFormulas.output: Outputs an action which (when run) will place the cursor on object.

actionFormulas.name: AddOrModifyRows
actionFormulas.description: Modify matching rows or add one if none match
actionFormulas.output: Outputs an action which (when run) will modify all rows in table matching expression with specified columnValue(s). If no rows match, will add a new row.

actionFormulas.name: AddRow
actionFormulas.description: Add a row to the table
actionFormulas.output: Outputs an action which (when run) will add a new row to table and update the specified column(s) with columnValue(s).

actionFormulas.name: CopyDoc
actionFormulas.description: Copy a document to your document list
actionFormulas.output: Outputs an action which (when run) will copy this or another document.

actionFormulas.name: CopyPageToDoc
actionFormulas.description: Copies the current page to a new doc or to another doc
actionFormulas.output: An action which when triggered will copy the current page.

actionFormulas.name: CopyToClipboard
actionFormulas.description: Copy content to your clipboard
actionFormulas.output: Outputs an action which (when run) will copy content to your clipboard. Rich text formatting will not be preserved.

actionFormulas.name: DeleteRows
actionFormulas.description: Deletes specified rows
actionFormulas.output: Outputs an action which (when run) will delete each row in rows.

actionFormulas.name: DuplicatePage
actionFormulas.signature: DuplicatePage(page, name, parentPage, copySubpages, duplicateOptions, rowOptions, makeVisible)
actionFormulas.description: Duplicates a page
actionFormulas.output: Outputs an action (when run) which will create a duplicate page of page with the given name.

actionFormulas.name: DuplicateRows
actionFormulas.description: Duplicates one or more rows
actionFormulas.output: Outputs an action value which (when run) will duplicate the target rows and modify the specified column(s) with columnValue.

actionFormulas.name: ExportCSV
actionFormulas.description: Export a table or view as a CSV file
actionFormulas.output: Outputs an action which (when run) will export the specified table/view as CSV.

actionFormulas.name: ModifyRows
actionFormulas.description: Modify values in one or more rows
actionFormulas.output: Outputs an action value which (when run) will modify the specified column(s) with columnValue(s) for each row in rows.

actionFormulas.name: NoAction
actionFormulas.description: Does nothing.
actionFormulas.output: Outputs an action which (when run) does nothing.

actionFormulas.name: Notify
actionFormulas.description: Notify doc users
actionFormulas.output: Outputs an action which (when run) will send message to people via an email and in-app notification.

actionFormulas.name: OnActionError
actionFormulas.description: Runs a main action first and then runs a secondary action only if an error was detected
actionFormulas.output: Outputs an action which (when run) will run action. actionOnError will run if there was an error detected with action.

actionFormulas.name: OpenRow
actionFormulas.description: Opens the row
actionFormulas.output: Outputs an action which (when run) will open the row.

actionFormulas.name: OpenWindow
actionFormulas.description: Open a link in a new tab
actionFormulas.output: Outputs an action which (when run) will open url in a new browser tab.

actionFormulas.name: RefreshAssistant
actionFormulas.description: Refresh assistant related things
actionFormulas.output: Outputs an action which (when run) refreshes assistant data in references(s).

actionFormulas.name: RefreshColumn
actionFormulas.description: Refresh Pack columns
actionFormulas.output: Outputs an action which (when run) refreshes Pack data in column(s).

actionFormulas.name: RefreshTable
actionFormulas.description: Refreshes the given Pack table. This is not supported in automations.
actionFormulas.output: Outputs an action which (when run) queues up a sync of the given table. Subsequent actions may complete before the sync starts, but syncs in the queue are processed sequentially.

actionFormulas.name: ResetControlValue
actionFormulas.description: Resets the value of a control
actionFormulas.output: Outputs an action value which (when run) will reset the value of control.

actionFormulas.name: RunActions
actionFormulas.description: Run one or more actions
actionFormulas.output: Outputs an action which (when run) will run all provided action(s).

actionFormulas.name: SetControlValue
actionFormulas.description: Set the value of a control
actionFormulas.output: Outputs an action value which (when run) will set the specified control with value.

actionFormulas.name: SetCrossDocSyncFilter
actionFormulas.description: Update the sync filter for a cross doc.

actionFormulas.name: SetPackSyncTableConfigValue
actionFormulas.description: Set the sync field setting for a sync table.

actionFormulas.name: SetPageName
actionFormulas.description: Update the name of the target page
actionFormulas.output: An action which when triggered will set the name of the target page.

actionFormulas.name: SetPageVisibility
actionFormulas.description: Update the visibility of the target page
actionFormulas.output: An action which when triggered will set the visibility of the target page.

actionFormulas.name: SignUpForCoda
actionFormulas.description: Open a dialog that prompts the user to sign up for Coda
actionFormulas.output: An action which when triggered will allow the user to sign up/sign in to Coda if they are not already signed in.
